headline: How Verizon’s Expanded 5G Network Slicing and World Cup Buildout Could Impact Verizon Communications (VZ) Investors
summary: Earlier this month, Verizon Communications expanded its Verizon Frontline Network Slice, making dedicated 5G Ultra Wideband connectivity available on compatible laptops, tablets and smartphones used by first responders, while also deploying advanced 5G and fiber infrastructure for FIFA World Cup 2026 venues and surrounding communities. These moves underline Verizon’s push into higher-value public safety and large-event infrastructure, where reliable, prioritized connectivity and...
